title: cryptarrhena kegelii
intro: Cryptarrhena kegelii, also known as the 'Pitaya' or 'Dragon Fruit Cactus', is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical forests of South America. The medicinal properties of this plant include its potential in treating fever, cough, and other respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cryptarrhena kegelii include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs, and its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is then used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult a medical professional before using any herbal remedies.
